content.en:
Airplanes!

Ye Tian's soul will was slightly damaged, but at least he was able to bear it.

"Absorb the energy of the misty pluto right here!"

Ye Tian decided.

In the following days, he was here to absorb the energy of the Fog Pluto and cultivate the Fog Pluto.

Time passes.

Ye Tian's Mist Pluto Star Aperture became stronger and stronger, after a thousand domain yuan years had passed.

Rumble!

Ye Tian's Misty Pluto Aperture was finally cultivated, and the Mist Pluto Mark was born, giving birth to a Supreme Domain Body Secret Technique.

This supreme body secret technique is called the light of the fog and the underworld, which can attack the enemy's soul will, and can also temper one's own soul will, and the effect is very powerful.

And during this time, he absorbed a large amount of the energy of the Fog Pluto, and his soul will also reached the limit of the sixteenth dimension.

After reaching the limit of the will of the sixteenth dimension, the will of the soul fell into a bottleneck, and it was almost impossible to use any resources to break through.

"The original Purple Yun Realm Lord was able to break the shackles with the help of a domain body secret technique and raise the soul will to the seventeenth dimension, maybe my misty light can also 18 help my soul will break the limit and rise to the seventeenth dimension. "

Subsequently.

He tried to cultivate the light of the mist and the underworld, and under the effect of the light of the mist, his soul will was indeed slowly improving, although the amplitude of the improvement was almost invisible, but as long as he continued to improve in this way, he would definitely be able to break the boundary and raise the soul will to the seventeenth dimension.

In the days that followed, Ye Tian went to other multi-dimensional stars to absorb the energy of multi-dimensional stars to cultivate one star after another.

Time flies.

Ye Tian cultivated one star after another to the consummation realm, and his body became stronger and stronger.

One hundred and fifty consummation stars!

One hundred and sixty perfect star tips!

One hundred and seventy consummation of the stars!

With the passage of time, Ye Tian also created the third Eight Realms Supreme Peerless Sect - the Ten Star Battle Suit, which condensed into a set of battle suits with the power of ten multi-dimensional stars to protect himself, so that his defense reached an extremely terrifying level.

And his supreme dimensional rules have now skyrocketed significantly, reaching the twenty-sixth-fold realm.

At this time, he sensed the bottleneck of the supreme dimensional rules, and there was no way to continue to comprehend.

However, he sensed the existence of the chain of supreme dimensional rules, and as long as he cut off the chain of supreme dimensional rules, he could continue to attain enlightenment.

Immediately, Ye Tian used the Eight Realms Supreme Absolute Seven-Star Sword Blade to attack this supreme dimensional rule chain.

Click!

The chains of the Supreme Dimensional Rules were cracked a bit, but they soon healed again.

He kept attacking, and the chains of supreme dimensional rules continued to heal.

In this case, it would be difficult for him to break the chains of the Supreme Dimension's rules.

"It's still a little bit close!"

Ye Tian frowned slightly.

Perhaps when his soul will breaks to the seventeenth dimension, he will have the hope of breaking the chains of the rules of this supreme dimension.

So in the following years, most of his sword time was spent cultivating the light of the mist and the underworld, constantly refining the will of the soul.

And just like that, another long time passed.

Finally this day.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's soul will finally completed the breakthrough, breaking through from the sixteenth dimension to the seventeenth dimension.

After the transformation of the soul will, Ye Tian once again used the Seven Star Sword Blade to attack the Supreme Dimensional Rule Chain.

This time the effect is different.

Click!!

The chains of the Supreme Dimensional Rules were cracked, and they were so large that they didn't have time to heal.

Ye Tian continued to attack, and an attack landed on the chain of supreme dimensional rules in the underworld.

I don't know how long it has been, but the chain of supreme dimensional rules was finally cut open by Ye Tian.

With the Supreme Dimensional Rules shattering and shattering, Ye Tian could continue to comprehend the Supreme Dimensional Rule Chains.

The years that followed.

Ye Tian continued to comprehend the rules of the supreme dimension with the help of the primordial astrology, and continued to improve.

After a period of time, Ye Tian comprehended the twenty-seventh supreme dimensional rule, and then comprehended the twenty-eighth supreme dimensional rule.

this day.

Ye Tian's cultivation finally broke through again, reaching the late stage of the eighth realm.

And as his strength continues to improve, there are very few multi-dimensional stars that can make him inaccessible.

He continued to absorb the energy of multi-dimensional stars, and one by one the stars were perfected, and the secret techniques of the supreme dimensional domain body were also increasing, and the increase in strength became more and more terrifying.

In the blink of an eye.

The 300,000 domain years have passed.

"The three hundred and sixty star aperture is complete, and only the last five star aperture remain. "

"The Supreme Dimension Rules have also comprehended the Thirty-Sixth Dimension Realm, reaching the true limit! If I can't break through to the Ninth Realm with my cultivation, it will be impossible for me to continue to comprehend the Thirty-Seventh Fold Supreme Dimension Rules!"

In terms of cultivation, he also made progress again, reaching the peak realm of the eighth realm.

At this time.

Ye Tian obviously felt that if he cultivated all the three hundred and sixty-five star apertures perfectly, he would have an astonishing transformation.

And after comprehending the rules of the thirty-sixth supreme dimension, he had already reached the bottleneck of the ninth realm in the dark.

But he didn't go to the ninth realm, he was completely waiting for the three hundred and sixty-five star aperture to be consummated.

"The last five multidimensional stars are all in the eighteenth dimension. "

"Eternal Star!"

"Darkest Star!"

"Stellar Star!"

"Abyssal Star!"

"Space-time star!"

The power of these five multi-dimensional stars is no less than that of the primordial star 177, or even more powerful.

Even if he can't get close now, he still has to use the fragments of the multi-dimensional supreme thing to be able to cultivate in these five multi-dimensional astral bodies.

And this requires a lot of fragments of multidimensional supreme things.

"I have to go find that Ninth Realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

......

Upper Domain, Territory No. 19.

Ice Leaf Ancient Abyss.

Ye Tian came here to visit the master of the Ice Leaf Ancient Abyss, the Ice Leaf Realm Lord, who was also the Ninth Realm, and in the last time he fought for the fragments of the Multi-dimensional Supreme Thing, he had snatched a lot of fragments of the Multi-dimensional Supreme Thing.

If she was willing to hand over all the fragments of the Multidimensional Supreme Thing to him, he would be sure that he would be able to complete his cultivation of the last five star apertures.

As for whether this Ice Leaf Realm Lord was willing, he also had an idea.

"The Lord of the Terran Ye Heaven Realm has come to visit the Ice Leaf Ancient Abyss!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

However, there was no response.

Ye Tian also knew that this Ice Leaf Realm Lord was very arrogant, so he stepped into the Ice Leaf Ancient Abyss.

"Look for death!"

The voice of the Ice Leaf Realm Lord came, and he crossed the dimensional void to kill with one finger.

However.

Ye Tian directly cast the Seven Star Sword Blade, colliding with the attack of this Ice Leaf Realm Lord.

Rumble!

Ye Tian retreated some distance, but there were no injuries.
